primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹180,000 Cr. Fuel cost ~₹110,000 Cr (61%), Employee costs ~₹10,000 Cr (5.6%), R&M ~₹8,000 Cr (4.4%).
Revenue ~₹160,000 Cr. Production costs ~₹22,000 Cr (13.8%), Employee ~₹18,000 Cr (11.3%), Statutory levies ~₹38,000 Cr (23.8%).

primary_sources.source_name: Power Grid Corporation FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 532898)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹50,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹5,000 Cr (10%), O&M ~₹3,000 Cr (6%). Transmission business.
National electricity statistics: generation cost per unit, plant load factor, O&M cost benchmarks for thermal and renewable generation.

primary_sources.source_name: Adani Green Energy FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 541450)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹11,000 Cr. O&M ~₹1,100 Cr (10%), Employee ~₹500 Cr (4.5%). Renewable energy cost structure.

source_metadata.methodology: Energy sector has high fuel cost dominance (40-65% of revenue for thermal utilities) which distorts % of revenue metrics for operating costs. P25/P50/P75 derived from FY24-25 annual reports of 4 India-listed energy companies (NTPC, ONGC, PowerGrid, Adani Green). CEA aggregate data used for cross-validation. Non-fuel operating costs are benchmarked separately.

HR.source_note: Employee costs % of revenue. NTPC FY25: 5.6%, Adani Green FY25: 4.5%, PowerGrid FY25: 10%, ONGC FY25: 11.3%. Thermal utilities: 5-8%; T&D: 8-12%; O&G upstream: 10-13%. Renewables are lower (fewer O&M staff per MW).

PLANT_MAINTENANCE.source_note: O&M (operations and maintenance) costs. NTPC FY25 R&M: 4.4%, PowerGrid: ~6%. CEA benchmarks: thermal generation O&M ₹10-16 Lakh/MW/year. Renewables: ₹5-8 Lakh/MW/year.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Contract services: EPC support, AMC, security, housekeeping. NTPC and PowerGrid use extensive contract labour for non-core operations. ONGC: well services outsourcing.

IT.source_note: IT including SCADA, grid management systems, ERP. Gartner Utilities IT 2024: energy sector IT spend 1-2% of revenue. Smart grid investments driving higher spend in T&D.

FACILITIES.source_note: Office and administrative facilities (plant infrastructure excluded). INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — office overhead for head office and regional offices.

BRSR_ESG.source_note: CSR and ESG compliance costs. NTPC FY25: CSR spend ₹550 Cr (0.3% of revenue). Companies Act mandatory 2% of PAT for CSR. BRSR compliance costs.

INSURANCE.source_note: Plant & machinery insurance, third-party liability. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.
